patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 # RGE Handoff Document
 
+> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-03 (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A3 — Play menu landed; the **View** menu is now the lone remaining standard menu deferred): #297 (`6ea5006`, MENUREGISTRY-PLAYMENU-A3) added a **Play** menu (Play / Pause / Stop / Step) to the host menu bar, driven by the same W08 `MenuRegistry` path as File + Edit — `EguiHost::new` declares a third extension point `editor.main_menu.play`, registers Play / Pause / Stop / Step as `MenuEntry`s, resolves once (one registry, all three points), and the editor-shell drain routes `Command::PlayStart` / `PlayPause` / `PlayStop` / `PlayStep` to `EditorShell::handle_button(ToolbarButtonId::Play / Pause / Stop / Step)` — the same PIE transition path the play-toolbar buttons drive (a click in a `PlayState` where its transition is a no-op, e.g. Stop while Editing → `PlayStateError::NoSnapshot`, is swallowed at debug BEFORE any mutation, mirroring the Space/Escape playback swallow). This supersedes the A2 snapshot below, which listed the Play menu as the deferred next feature beat. STILL DEFERRED (narrowed further): the **View** menu — now the lone remaining standard menu — needs a NEW camera-reset action first (e.g. via `isometric_camera_for_bounds`); registry/accelerator-driven command execution (clicks still use the FIFO), accelerator-table execution/display/conflict population, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, and per-frame re-resolve (no Play⇄Pause dynamic toggle label yet — v0 ships fixed labels). The A2 / A1 snapshots below and older dated lines are historical and are not rewritten in place.
+
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-02 (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A2 — Edit menu landed; only View/Play menus remain deferred): #295 (`0bc6a0c`, MENUREGISTRY-EDITMENU-A2) added an **Edit** menu (Undo / Redo) to the host menu bar, driven by the same W08 `MenuRegistry` path as File — `EguiHost::new` declares `editor.main_menu.edit`, registers Undo / Redo as `MenuEntry`s, resolves once (one registry, both points), and the editor-shell drain routes `Command::Undo` / `Command::Redo` to `EditorShell::undo_command` / `redo_command`, behavior-identical to the existing `Ctrl+Z` / `Ctrl+Y` keystrokes. This supersedes the A1 snapshot below, which listed the Edit menu as deferred. STILL DEFERRED (narrowed further): the **View** menu (needs a NEW camera-reset action first, e.g. via `isometric_camera_for_bounds`) and the **Play** menu (needs only menu/UI wiring, NOT a new action — `Command::PlayStart` / `PlayStop` / `PlayPause` / `PlayStep` already exist and the PIE path is already runtime-wired through `EditorShell::handle_button`, Phase 5.3 CLOSED, so the Play menu is pure FIFO→`handle_button` wiring and is the intended next feature beat); registry/accelerator-driven command execution (clicks still use the FIFO), accelerator-table execution/display/conflict population, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, and per-frame re-resolve. The A1 snapshot below and older dated lines are historical and are not rewritten in place.
 
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-02 (MENUREGISTRY-FILEBAR-A1-DOC-RECONCILE — A1 landed, File menu entries are now `MenuRegistry::resolve`-produced): #291 (`79fa41b`) changed `editor-egui-host` so `EguiHost::new` builds the File menu through the W08 `MenuRegistry`: declare `editor.main_menu.file`, register Open / Save / Save As New Project as `MenuEntry`s, resolve with an empty `PredicateContext`, and cache the resolved `(label, Command)` pairs. The rendered File menu remains behavior-identical: same labels, same order, same host->shell FIFO, same editor-shell routing from #288. This supersedes the #287/#288 snapshot below that described the File bar as a direct host menu over a hardcoded item list with `MenuRegistry::resolve` deferred. STILL DEFERRED (narrowed): registry/accelerator-driven command execution (File clicks still use the FIFO), Edit/View/Play menus, accelerator-table execution/display/conflict population, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, and per-frame re-resolve. Older dated 2026-06-01 / 2026-05-28 audit lines that say no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` are historical and are not rewritten in place.

@@ -1652,3 +1652,5 @@ ew / partial / is_full_revolution / existing geometry tests. **Critical design c
 2026-06-02 (MENUREGISTRY-FILEBAR-A1-DOC-RECONCILE — planning-substrate hygiene after A1, docs-only). Forward-only reconciliation that #291 (`79fa41b`, MENUREGISTRY-FILEBAR-A1) landed the previously deferred File-menu item production through `MenuRegistry::resolve`. The File bar remains behavior-identical: `editor-egui-host` declares `editor.main_menu.file`, registers Open / Save / Save As New Project as `MenuEntry`s, resolves against empty `PredicateContext`, caches the resolved `(label, Command)` pairs in `EguiHost::new`, and still pushes the same `Command` values through the existing host->shell FIFO that #288 routes in editor-shell. This entry plus top snapshots in `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` and a new `plans/BASELINE.md` 2026-06-02 subsection supersede the now-stale #287/#288 "direct host menu bar over a hardcoded item list / MenuRegistry::resolve deferred" framing. **Still deferred (narrowed):** registry/accelerator-driven command execution (File clicks still use FIFO), Edit/View/Play menus, accelerator-table execution/display/conflict population, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, per-frame re-resolve, plus non-menu audit gaps (drag-drop, `io-image`, World-only Command-Bus `Action` context). **History preserved:** older 2026-06-01 / 2026-05-28 audit lines that say no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` remain as dated records and are superseded forward, not rewritten. **Scope:** docs-only; edits confined to `plans/BASELINE.md`, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `change.md`; no Rust/test/Cargo/automation changes. Verification: `git diff --check` clean; grep confirms no living current snapshot still says the File bar is hardcoded while `MenuRegistry::resolve` is deferred.
 
 2026-06-02 (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A2 — planning-substrate hygiene after A2 + menu rustdoc + lint-doc counts, docs-only). Forward-only reconciliation after #295 (`0bc6a0c`, MENUREGISTRY-EDITMENU-A2) added the **Edit** menu (Undo / Redo) via `MenuRegistry`. The host builds both menus from one registry (`build_main_menu_entries` declares `editor.main_menu.file` + `editor.main_menu.edit`, resolves once, caches both lists; `render` paints a second `menu_button("Edit")`); `editor-shell` `drain_and_route_menu_commands` routes `Command::Undo` / `Command::Redo` to `EditorShell::undo_command` / `redo_command`, behavior-identical to `Ctrl+Z` / `Ctrl+Y`. This entry + new top snapshots in `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` + a new `plans/BASELINE.md` A2 subsection supersede the now-stale "Edit menu deferred" framing from the #292 / A1 reconcile (which predated A2). **Also folded in (post-2026-06-02 deep-audit doc hygiene):** fixed stale menu rustdoc in `crates/editor-egui-host/src/{lib.rs,handoff.rs}` (the "Dispatch A only enqueues — nothing drains yet" claim was false since #288 added the drain; the "the File menu bar" framing widened to "File + Edit"); and corrected VERIFIED-stale counts in `docs/§18/ARCHITECTURE_LINTS.md` — forbidden-dep **6 → 7 rules** (Rule 7 `editor-shell` loader-free landed #280), exemptions **60 → 28** total (all failure-class rollout-debt; **28 remain** of the original 81; no graph-foundation or reserved entries — verified with anchored `grep -c '^\[\[exemption\]\]'`, since the unanchored form over-counts by matching the file's schema comment). **Still deferred (narrowed):** the View menu (needs a NEW camera-reset action first) and the Play menu (needs only menu/UI wiring — Play is already runtime-wired via `EditorShell::handle_button`, with `Command::PlayStart` / `PlayStop` / `PlayPause` / `PlayStep` variants present, so it is pure FIFO→`handle_button` wiring with no new action, the intended next feature beat), accelerator-table execution/display/conflict, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, per-frame re-resolve. **History preserved:** the A1 (#292) reconcile entry above + all older dated entries are byte-identical (forward-only). **Scope:** docs + rustdoc/comments only — edits confined to `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `plans/BASELINE.md`, `change.md`, `crates/editor-egui-host/src/{lib.rs,handoff.rs}`, `docs/§18/ARCHITECTURE_LINTS.md`; no Rust source-logic / test / Cargo / routing change. Provenance: the 2026-06-02 post-menu-arc read-only 5-axis deep audit (health strong; authority intact; no kernel-cavity pressure). Gate: VERIFY OK 7/7 + 10/10 arch lints.
+
+2026-06-03 (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A3 — planning-substrate hygiene after A3, docs-only). Forward-only reconciliation after #297 (`6ea5006`, MENUREGISTRY-PLAYMENU-A3) added the **Play** menu (Play / Pause / Stop / Step) via `MenuRegistry`. The host now builds all three menus from one registry (`build_main_menu_entries` declares `editor.main_menu.file` + `editor.main_menu.edit` + `editor.main_menu.play`, resolves once, caches all three lists; `render` paints a third `menu_button("Play")`); `editor-shell` `drain_and_route_menu_commands` routes `Command::PlayStart` / `PlayPause` / `PlayStop` / `PlayStep` to `EditorShell::handle_button(ToolbarButtonId::Play / Pause / Stop / Step)` via a `route_play_button` helper — the same PIE path the play-toolbar buttons drive, with benign invalid-state `PlayStateError` (e.g. Stop while Editing → `NoSnapshot`) swallowed at debug before any mutation (mirrors the Space/Escape playback swallow). This entry + new top snapshots in `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` + a new `plans/BASELINE.md` A3 subsection supersede the now-stale "Play menu deferred / the intended next feature beat" framing from the A2 reconcile (which predated A3). **Menu rustdoc already current:** #297 itself widened the `editor-egui-host` menu rustdoc/comments from "File + Edit" to "File + Edit + Play" (its `bdd9531` correction round), so — unlike A2 — this docs reconcile touches NO source comments and NO `docs/§18/ARCHITECTURE_LINTS.md` counts. **Still deferred (narrowed to View alone):** the **View** menu is now the lone remaining standard menu and needs a NEW camera-reset action first (e.g. via `isometric_camera_for_bounds`) — unlike Play, View has no reachable shell action yet, so it is a feature beat, not pure wiring; plus accelerator-table execution/display/conflict, plugin entries, dynamic predicates, per-frame re-resolve (including a Play⇄Pause dynamic toggle label — v0 ships fixed labels). **History preserved:** the A2 (#296) reconcile entry above + all older dated entries are byte-identical (forward-only). **Scope:** docs-only — edits confined to `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `plans/BASELINE.md`, `change.md`; no Rust source-logic / test / Cargo / routing / rustdoc / lint-doc change. **Verification:** `git diff --check` clean; `git diff --stat 6ea5006..HEAD` = exactly the 4 docs; `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exit 0 (`VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`, 10/10 architecture lints 0 violations — Markdown-only change, no Rust touched). **Three required references present in this entry:** `plans/BASELINE.md` new "2026-06-03 — Play menu now registry-produced (#297 A3)" subsection, the merged PR #297 (`6ea5006`), and `ai_handoffs/MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A3_TASK_2026-06-03_11-13-31+0300.md`.

@@ -558,6 +558,21 @@ Until **at least one** of those fires, treat the reflection substrate as observe
 4. Cross-check the editor's call graph against the `CommandBus::submit` / `Action::apply` / `Action::revert` signatures to determine whether user-visible CAD mutations can flow through the existing bus.
 5. Test inventory across `editor-*` (`#[test]` count + integration vs unit breakdown + workflow coverage).
 
+### 2026-06-03 — Play menu now registry-produced (#297 A3)
+
+**Forward-only follow-up (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A3).** Supersedes the A2 subsection below, which listed the Play menu among the deferred items as the intended next feature beat. A3 landed on main at `6ea5006` via PR #297.
+
+**Now CLOSED — the Play menu (Play / Pause / Stop / Step).** `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs` builds ALL THREE menus from a single `MenuRegistry`: `build_main_menu_entries()` declares `editor.main_menu.file` + `editor.main_menu.edit` + `editor.main_menu.play` (the new `PLAY_MENU_EXTENSION_POINT`), registers Open/Save/Save-As + Undo/Redo + Play/Pause/Stop/Step, resolves once against an empty `PredicateContext`, and caches all three resolved `(label, Command)` lists on `EguiHost`; `render()` paints a third `menu_button("Play")`. `editor-shell` `drain_and_route_menu_commands` routes `Command::PlayStart` / `PlayPause` / `PlayStop` / `PlayStep` to `EditorShell::handle_button(ToolbarButtonId::Play / Pause / Stop / Step)` via a small `route_play_button` helper — the exact PIE transition path the play-toolbar buttons drive. Because the four items are STATIC (always present/clickable), an item activated in a `PlayState` where its transition is a no-op (e.g. Stop while `Editing` → `PlayStateError::NoSnapshot`) is swallowed at debug before any mutation (`handle_button` returns `Err` before mutating), mirroring the Space/Escape swallow in `handle_playback_command`.
+
+**Still open — explicitly NOT closed here (narrowed from the A2 list to View alone):**
+- **View → Reset Camera** is now the LONE remaining standard menu and still needs a NEW action first (e.g. via `isometric_camera_for_bounds`). Unlike Play — which already had both `Command` variants AND a reachable `handle_button` action (so A3 was pure FIFO→`handle_button` wiring) — View has no reachable shell action yet, so it is a feature beat, not pure wiring.
+- accelerator-table execution/display/conflict population, plugin menu entries, dynamic predicates, and per-frame re-resolve remain unbuilt — including a Play⇄Pause dynamic toggle label (v0 ships fixed labels; a live toggle needs the deferred per-frame re-resolve).
+- Generalized registry/accelerator-driven command execution remains deferred (menu clicks still flow through the host→shell FIFO + `editor-shell` routing, not a registry/accelerator execution path).
+
+**Historical preservation.** The A2 / A1 subsections below and all earlier dated entries are preserved byte-identical as dated history; their "Play … deferred / next beat" lines are superseded forward by this subsection, not rewritten in place.
+
+**Scope:** docs only (`Status.md` + `HANDOFF.md` + `plans/BASELINE.md` + `change.md`); no Rust source-logic / test / Cargo / routing change (the menu rustdoc was already widened to File + Edit + Play inside #297 itself).
+
 ### 2026-06-02 — Edit menu now registry-produced (#295 A2)
 
 **Forward-only follow-up (MENUARC-DOC-RECONCILE-A2).** Supersedes the A1 subsection below, which listed the Edit menu among the deferred items. A2 landed on main at `0bc6a0c` via PR #295.
